TextENGNew: ``...Oh? What are you doing?``
``Ah, Mom. Looks like we ran out of hot water so I came to heat some up.``
``Hehehe... You say that, but are you sure you're not trying to hide a little something? The alcohol today is quite fine.``
``Huh? Really? In that case, I'll have one too...``
``Aahahaha! You'll have to wait a little longer. We'll drag something even better out of the storehouse for you in a few years~!``
``Okay. Looking forward to it. Hehehe...``
``...You can head back home by yourself if that's what you want.``
``What's that, Mom? Am I the odd one out again?``
``That's not it. ...It's just that I've been thinking... being here must be tough for you.``
``I've been your mother for how many years now? I can understand that much. ...I don't want this event to bring up bad memories for you.``
``......It can't be helped. Sis's current situation is completely different from back then.``
``Is that so? If you don't see it, that's fine. ...But just remember this. What happened back then wasn't done out of malice towards you. He was just a bad fit, that's all.``
``......He was a bad person?``
``...Not at all, I think he was a good kid. I believe he was an admirable young man, enduring a hard life looking out for his sister.``
``...But this is Hinamizawa, and you're a Sonozaki. Your whims alone are not enough to change that. ...And mother didn't want you becoming a social outcast, too...``
``...When you say ``mother`` are you talking about yourself? Or... Granny?``

``Both. Honestly, as far as the head of the family is concerned, you're just as important as Mion. Of course, I understand if it's painful now, but she's taking on the role of the villain for the sake of the village, so could you try to show her some understanding...?``
``......That's a difficult request. To be honest, if you were to ask me that now I couldn't help but say no. ...But... if you give me a little more time... just a little longer...``
Just then, the kettle on the stove began to steam. When Shion saw that, she flipped the switch to turn out the flame.
``Oh? Done already? In that case, take this bottle with you.``
``I'm sorry. And thanks... Mom.``
``What's that?``
``......So that's two bottles to fill your share, Mom?``
